    "Air admittance valve (AAV) installed in a prohibited location or application"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Remove the prohibited air admittance valve",
    "Reroute and install a conventional open-air vent terminal through the roof or connect to an existing vent stack in compliance with local plumbing codes"

  "rationale": "The installation of an air admittance valve (AAV) in a prohibited location violates plumbing code regulations (IPC/UPC). AAVs are restricted in certain applications, such as venting sumps, chemical waste systems, or where prohibited by local jurisdictions, requiring a transition to a standard atmospheric vent.",
